prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年物理类最低位次分别为约8809→18422→9468→15532→8621，波动剧烈。2022年因，2023年回升至9468 ，2024年再跌至15532，2025年大幅回升至8621，创近5年最佳。近3年呈现\"涨—跌—涨\"的宽幅震荡格局，2025年基准位次约8621名；该校在吉林省物理类招生 计划2021年30人、2022年30人、2023年35人、2024年43人、2025年41人、2026年41人。2026年计划与2025年持平，无扩缩招，供需弹性中性。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 北京中医药大学为 211工程、双一流建设高校，软科中国大学排名从2021年第103名持续上升至2026年第63名，排名提升显著，反映学校综合实力增强，对考生吸引力有所上升；20 26年高考周期声誉评价为偏负面，主要原因是2025年该校在河北、河南等地录取位次下滑超500名，中医学专业在黑龙江、吉林等省份出现断档，最低录取位次跌至二本线附近， 该信号对2026年吉林省考生报考心理可能产生一定负面影响。抖音热度排名第103位，评价为一般，短视频平台曝光量偏低；中医学、中西医结合均为国家级A+ 学科（第五轮学科评估），中药学为A-学科，在中医药领域处于全国顶尖水平。中医学（领军人才培养计划）、中西医临床医学（华佗班）等长学制精英班型对高分考生有较强吸 引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 临床医学、口腔医学等医学大类社会热度持续偏高，中医药相关专业受益于国家政策扶持和健康产业扩张，报考关注度稳中有升。吉林省2026年高 考报名总人数约110868人，较2025年（111492人）微降约0.6%，物理类考生按近年占比约72%估算约79936人，较2025年物理类80421人略减，竞争压力基本稳定。；北京中医药大学位于北京市，对吉林省考生而言属于跨省报考。该校在吉林省物理类招生计划占比较小（约41人），属于省外中等规模招 生。北京作为一线城市对考生有持续吸引力，但近年地域偏好有所分化。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年位次8621为近5年最佳、2026年招生计划持平、学校软科排名持续上升但声 誉偏负面且有断档信号、吉林省考生总数微降等因素，预计2026年物理类最低录取位次较2025年小幅后移。预测最低位次约8921名，区间8421–9421名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for the Physics Category were approximately 8809 → 18422 → 9468 → 15532 → 8621, showing significant fluctuations. In 2022, due to [reason], the ranking dropped; in 2023, it rebounded to 9468; in 2024, it fell again to 15532; and in 2025, it surged to 8621, the best in the past five years. The past three years have shown a wide-range oscillation pattern of "rise-fall-rise," with a baseline ranking of approximately 8621 in 2025. The university's enrollment plan for the Physics Category in Jilin Province was 30 in 2021, 30 in 2022, 35 in 2023, 43 in 2024, 41 in 2025, and 41 in 2026. The 2026 plan is unchanged from 2025, with no expansion or reduction, indicating neutral supply-demand elasticity.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Beijing University of Chinese Medicine is a 211 Project and Double First-Class university. Its ranking in the Soft Science University Rankings has risen continuously from 103rd in 2021 to 63rd in 2026, reflecting a significant improvement in comprehensive strength and increasing attractiveness to candidates. However, the reputation evaluation for the 2026 college entrance examination cycle is slightly negative, mainly because in 2025, the university's admission rankings in Hebei, Henan, and other provinces dropped by over 500 places, and the Chinese Medicine major experienced gaps in Heilongjiang, Jilin, and other provinces, with the minimum admission ranking falling near the second-tier line. This signal may have a certain negative impact on the application psychology of Jilin candidates in 2026. The Douyin popularity ranking is 103rd, rated as average, with low exposure on short video platforms. Chinese Medicine and Integrated Chinese and Western Medicine are both national A+ disciplines (fifth round of discipline evaluation), and Chinese Materia Medica is an A- discipline, placing the university at the top national level in the field of traditional Chinese medicine. Elite programs with long study durations, such as Chinese Medicine (Leading Talent Training Plan) and Integrated Chinese and Western Clinical Medicine (Hua Tuo Class), have strong appeal to high-scoring candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Medical majors such as Clinical Medicine and Stomatology continue to have high social popularity, while majors related to traditional Chinese medicine benefit from national policy support and the expansion of the health industry, with steadily increasing application attention. The total number of candidates registered for the 2026 college entrance examination in Jilin Province is approximately 110,868, a slight decrease of about 0.6% from 2025 (111,492). The number of Physics Category candidates, estimated at about 72% of the total, is approximately 79,936, slightly lower than the 80,421 in 2025, indicating basically stable competition pressure. Beijing University of Chinese Medicine is located in Beijing, which is a cross-province application for Jilin candidates. The university's enrollment plan for the Physics Category in Jilin Province is relatively small (about 41 students), representing a medium-scale enrollment from outside the province. Beijing, as a first-tier city, continues to attract candidates, but regional preferences have become somewhat differentiated in recent years.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering that the 2025 ranking of 8621 is the best in the past five years, the 2026 enrollment plan remains unchanged, the university's Soft Science ranking continues to rise but its reputation is slightly negative with gap signals, and the total number of candidates in Jilin Province has slightly decreased, it is expected that the minimum admission ranking for the Physics Category in 2026 will shift slightly backward compared to 2025. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 8921, with a range of 8421 to 9421.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking falls within the predicted range of 8421 to 9421, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main choice, use Tier 1 elite long-study programs as a reach, and Tier 3 majors as a safety net. If your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (e.g., within 8400), you can focus on reaching for the Chinese Medicine Leading Talent Training Plan or Hua Tuo Class. If your ranking is in the middle of the range (around 8900), prioritize the Excellent 5+3 Integrated Program or Experimental Class. If your ranking is near the upper limit of the range (around 9400), it is advisable to mainly use Tier 3 majors as a safety net.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for History Category (Liberal Arts Group) were approximately 505, 2816, 2046, 1887, and 1579 respectively. The ranking was extremely high in 2021 (505th), dropped sharply to 2816th in 2022, and then gradually recovered (2046, 1887, 1579), with continuous advancement in the last three years and intensifying competition. The baseline ranking for 2025 is about 1579th. The enrollment plan for History Category in Jilin Province was 4 students in 2021, 4 in 2022, 4 in 2023, 2 in 2024, 4 in 2025, and 5 in 2026. The 2026 plan increases by 1 student (25% expansion) compared to 2025. According to supply-demand elasticity, the ranking should shift backward, but changes in the number of examinees and the improvement of the school's level have offsetting effects.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Beijing University of Chinese Medicine is a 211 Project and Double First-Class university. Its ranking in the Soft Science China University Rankings has continuously risen from 103rd in 2021 to 63rd in 2026, reflecting a significant improvement in overall strength and increased attractiveness to examinees. The reputation evaluation for the 2026 college entrance examination cycle is slightly negative, mainly due to the decline in admission rankings in Hebei, Henan, and other provinces in 2025, and signals of gaps in Chinese Medicine majors in Heilongjiang, Jilin, and other provinces. Its Douyin popularity ranking is 103rd, with an average evaluation. History Category has few majors (only English, Acupuncture and Tuina, and Public Service Management), limiting application choices.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: The social popularity of English/Foreign Language majors is generally wait-and-see. Acupuncture and Tuina benefits from the popularity of Chinese Medicine and is relatively hot. Public Service Management has divided popularity and is wait-and-see. The total number of examinees for the 2026 college entrance examination in Jilin Province is about 110,868. History Category examinees, estimated at about 28% of the total in recent years, are about 30,932, roughly the same as the 31,071 History Category examinees in 2025. Beijing University of Chinese Medicine is located in Beijing, with very few enrollment spots for History Category examinees in Jilin Province (4–5 students), making rankings susceptible to fluctuations due to individual high-scoring examinees' application decisions. Beijing's region still has strong appeal to liberal arts examinees.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering that the 2025 ranking of 1579 is the best in the last four years, the 2026 plan expands by 25%, the school's ranking continues to rise, the reputation is slightly negative but the History Category enrollment scale is extremely small, it is expected that the minimum admission ranking for History Category in 2026 will shift slightly backward compared to 2025. The predicted minimum ranking is about 1786th, with a range of 1465 to 2107.

With rankings in the predicted range of 1465–2107, it is recommended to take Acupuncture and Tuina as the first-choice sprint target, English (Medical) and English (International Communication of Chinese Medicine) as stable choices, and Public Service Management (Health Management) as a safety option. If the ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (within 1465), focus on sprinting for Acupuncture and Tuina; if the ranking is in the middle of the range (around 1786), prioritize English majors; if the ranking is close to the upper limit of the range (around 2100), it is recommended to use Public Service Management as a safety.
